title: Alternun Infra Secrets Schema
description: Optional SST secrets consumed by infra automation scripts. Expo web deploy itself does not require secrets by default.

ExpoPublicApiBaseUrl.description: Optional API origin injected into Expo web build environments

ExpoPublicSupabaseUrl.description: Supabase project URL for Expo auth client

ExpoPublicSupabaseKey.description: Supabase anon/publishable key for Expo auth client

ExpoPublicWalletConnectProjectId.description: WalletConnect project id for web/mobile wallet connection

ExpoPublicWalletConnectChainId.description: Optional chain id used by wallet bridge
